title: Dover Corporation (DOV) Could Find Support Soon, Here's Why You Should Buy the Stock Now
text: Dover Corporation (DOV) witnesses a hammer chart pattern, indicating support found by the stock after losing some value lately. This coupled with an upward trend in earnings estimate revisions could mean a trend reversal for the stock in the near term.

title: Citi, Morgan Stanley Bump Up Dover Price Target After Q4 Results
text: Citi analyst Andrew Kaplowitz raised Dover Corp's  DOV price target to $221 from $218 and maintained a Buy rating on the shares. The analyst noted the strong topline performance and continued strength in bookings highlight a "still robust demand environment that should bolster confidence" in the company's 7% - 9% organic growth outlook for 2022.

title: Dover Reports Fourth Quarter And Full Year 2021 Results; Provides Full Year 2022 Guidance
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill., Jan. 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Dover (NYSE: DOV), a diversified global manufacturer, announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2021.

title: Markem-Imaje Launches New High-Resolution Inkjet Coding System, Advancing Traceability of Secondary Packaging
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill., Jan. 26, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Markem-Imaje, part of Dover (NYSE: DOV), recently announced the release of the new 5940 G Touch DryTM high-resolution inkjet coder.

title: CPC Expands Footprint to Accommodate Sales Trajectory
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill., Jan. 25, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- CPC (Colder Products Company), part of Dover (NYSE: DOV) and a leading manufacturer of connection technologies used in biopharmaceutical processing, medical, thermal management, and industrial applications, is expanding its footprint in Minneapolis-St. Paul.

title: Why Earnings Season Could Be Great for Dover (DOV)
text: Dover (DOV) is seeing favorable earnings estimate revision activity and has a positive Zacks Earnings ESP heading into earnings season.

title: TWG Announces Launch of New eCommerce Online Shop
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill., Jan. 24, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- TWG, part of Dover (NYSE: DOV), has launched its global e-commerce website, shop.dovertwg.com.

title: SWEP Introduces Hypertwain Technology for the AC & Heat Pump Markets
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill., Jan. 21, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- SWEP, part of Dover (NYSE: DOV), today announced the introduction of the FTW250AS brazed plate heat exchanger (BPHE), the first BPHE based on the Company's novel Hypertwain® technology.

title: Dover (DOV) to Report Q4 Earnings: Is a Beat in Store?
text: Dover's (DOV) Q4 performance is likely to reflect benefits from the solid order trends across segments, improved demand scenario and cost-reduction actions.

title: Dover Announces Fourth Quarter 2021 Earnings Release Date, Conference Call and Webcast
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill., Jan. 20, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Dover (NYSE: DOV) announced today that it will release fourth quarter 2021 earnings at approximately 6:00 a.m.

title: Can Dover Corporation (DOV) Keep the Earnings Surprise Streak Alive?
text: Dover Corporation (DOV) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: Hydro Systems Unveils Multi-Washer 3000 Series with EvoClean for On-Premise Laundry
text: DOWNERS GROVE, Ill., Jan. 12, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Hydro Systems, part of PSG and Dover (NYSE: DOV), today announced the release of the Multi-Washer 3000 Series with EvoClean for reliable chemical dispensing for on-premise laundries.
